# RobustMediate

**Robust causal mediation analysis** with embedded diagnostics,
dose-response curves, pathway-specific sensitivity (medITCV), and a
novel bivariate sensitivity contour.

## What it does

| Function | What it gives you |
|----|----|
| [`robustmediate()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/robustmediate.md) | Fit treatment / mediator / outcome models, compute IPW weights, NDE/NIE/TE curves with bootstrap CIs, and the full sensitivity surface in one call |
| [`plot_balance()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_balance.md) | Dual love plot: covariate balance before/after weighting for **both** pathways simultaneously |
| [`plot_mediation()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_mediation.md) | Dose-response curves of NDE, NIE, TE with pointwise confidence bands |
| [`plot_sensitivity()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_sensitivity.md) | Novel 2-D robustness map: E-value x Imai rho — does not exist elsewhere in R |
| [`sensitivity_meditcv()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/sensitivity_meditcv.md) | Pathway-specific mediation ITCV (medITCV) for a-path and b-path |
| [`plot_meditcv()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_meditcv.md) | Robustness corridor plot for each pathway |
| [`sensitivity_meditcv_profile()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/sensitivity_meditcv_profile.md) | Minimum robustness principle + bottleneck identification |
| [`plot_meditcv_profile()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_meditcv_profile.md) | Fragility profile as confounding impact increases |
| [`fragility_table()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/fragility_table.md) | Publication-ready pathway decomposition table |
| [`diagnose()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/diagnose.md) | Formatted report with a paste-ready Results paragraph |

## Installation

``` r

# Development version from GitHub
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pkg_install("causalfragility-lab/RobustMediate")
```

## Quick start

``` r

library(RobustMediate)

fit <- robustmediate(
  treatment_formula = X ~ Z1 + Z2,
  mediator_formula  = M ~ X + Z1 + Z2,
  outcome_formula   = Y ~ X + M + Z1 + Z2,
  data = mydata,
  R    = 500
)

plot_balance(fit)                        # love plot
plot_mediation(fit)                      # NDE / NIE dose-response curve
plot_sensitivity(fit)                    # E-value x rho contour
plot(fit, type = "meditcv")             # medITCV robustness corridor
plot(fit, type = "meditcv_profile")     # fragility profile
fragility_table(fit)                     # pathway decomposition
diagnose(fit)                            # paste into Results section
```

## Why this package?

- `EValue` plots E-values only
- `mediation` plots rho sensitivity only\
- `cobalt` / `WeightIt` do love plots for treatment only

**RobustMediate** combines all three into one coherent workflow tailored
to continuous-treatment mediation, and adds:

- The joint E-value x rho contour that exists nowhere else in R
- Pathway-specific medITCV (mediation ITCV) extending Frank (2000) to
  mediation
- Minimum robustness principle and bottleneck identification for
  indirect effects

## References

- Frank, K. A. (2000). Impact of a confounding variable on a regression
  coefficient. *Sociological Methods & Research*, 29(2), 147-194.
- VanderWeele, T. J. & Ding, P. (2017). Sensitivity analysis in
  observational research: Introducing the E-value. *Annals of Internal
  Medicine*, 167(4), 268-274.
- Imai, K., Keele, L., & Yamamoto, T. (2010). Identification, inference
  and sensitivity analysis for causal mediation effects. *Statistical
  Science*, 25(1), 51-71.

## Contributing

Bug reports and feature requests via [GitHub
Issues](https://github.com/causalfragility-lab/RobustMediate/issues).

## License

MIT

# Package index

## Main fitting function

- [`robustmediate()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/robustmediate.md)
  : Robust Causal Mediation Analysis

## Print and summary methods

- [`print(`*`<robmedfit>`*`)`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/print.robmedfit.md)
  : Print a robmedfit object
- [`summary(`*`<robmedfit>`*`)`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/summary.robmedfit.md)
  : Summary method for robmedfit objects
- [`plot(`*`<robmedfit>`*`)`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot.robmedfit.md)
  : Plot a robmedfit object

## Mediation ITCV (medITCV)

Pathway-specific robustness via mediation ITCV

- [`sensitivity_meditcv()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/sensitivity_meditcv.md)
  : Mediation ITCV (medITCV) for pathway-specific robustness
- [`print(`*`<meditcv>`*`)`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/print.meditcv.md)
  : Print a meditcv object
- [`plot_meditcv()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_meditcv.md)
  : Plot medITCV robustness corridors for both mediation pathways
- [`sensitivity_meditcv_profile()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/sensitivity_meditcv_profile.md)
  : medITCV Robustness Profile: Pathway-Specific Fragility Framework
- [`print(`*`<meditcv_profile>`*`)`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/print.meditcv_profile.md)
  : Print a meditcv_profile object
- [`plot_meditcv_profile()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_meditcv_profile.md)
  : Plot the medITCV Robustness Profile
- [`fragility_table()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/fragility_table.md)
  : Pathway Fragility Decomposition Table

## Sensitivity analysis

E-value, rho surface, and curvature-based fragility

- [`sensitivity_curvature()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/sensitivity_curvature.md)
  : Dose-Varying Fragility: Curvature-Based Sensitivity
- [`plot_curvature()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_curvature.md)
  : Plot Dose-Varying Fragility (Curvature-Based Sensitivity)

## Plots

Visualisation functions

- [`plot_balance()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_balance.md)
  : Love Plot: Balance Diagnostics for Both Pathways
- [`plot_mediation()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_mediation.md)
  : Dose-Response Curve: Natural Direct and Indirect Effects
- [`plot_sensitivity()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/plot_sensitivity.md)
  : Sensitivity Contour Plot: Joint E-value x Rho Display

## Diagnostics and utilities

- [`diagnose()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/diagnose.md)
  : Diagnose a robmedfit Object
- [`tipping_table()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/tipping_table.md)
  : Extract Tipping-Point Table
- [`compare_fits()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/compare_fits.md)
  : Compare Two robmedfit Objects Side by Side

## broom methods

- [`tidy.robmedfit()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/tidy.robmedfit.md)
  : Tidy a robmedfit object (broom-compatible)
- [`glance.robmedfit()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/glance.robmedfit.md)
  : Glance at a robmedfit object (broom-compatible)
- [`augment.robmedfit()`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/augment.robmedfit.md)
  : Augment data with fitted values from a robmedfit object
  (broom-compatible)
- [`as.data.frame(`*`<robmedfit>`*`)`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/as.data.frame.robmedfit.md)
  : Coerce effects curve to a data frame

## Data

- [`sim_mediation`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/sim_mediation.md)
  : Simulated Mediation Study Data

## Package

- [`RobustMediate`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/RobustMediate-package.md)
  [`RobustMediate-package`](https://causalfragility-lab.github.io/RobustMediate/reference/RobustMediate-package.md)
  : RobustMediate: Causal Mediation Analysis with Diagnostics and
  Sensitivity Analysis
